evalAfter: (async()=>{try{var app=document.getElementById('app');var vn=app.__vnode||app._vnode;var root=vn&&vn.component;if(!root)return{err:'no root'};localStorage.setItem('ps_session',JSON.stringify({id:'P-1',nombre:'Admin',rol:'Administrador',loginAt:Date.now()}));root.setupState.session={id:'P-1',nombre:'Admin',rol:'Administrador',loginAt:Date.now()};root.setupState.goModule('lanchas');await new Promise(function(r){setTimeout(r,3000);});function find(v){if(!v)return null;if(v.component){var ss=v.component.setupState;if(ss&&('showDatePicker' in ss)&&('calCells' in ss))return v.component;var f=find(v.component.subTree);if(f)return f;}var k=v.children;if(Array.isArray(k)){for(var i=0;i<k.length;i++){var f2=find(k[i]);if(f2)return f2;}}return null;}var lc=find(root.subTree);if(!lc)return{err:'ViewLanchas not found'};var ss=lc.setupState;var t=ss.today;var mp=t.slice(0,8);ss.fechas=[mp+'03',mp+'05',mp+'10',mp+'18',t];ss.currentFecha=mp+'10';ss.showDatePicker=true;await new Promise(function(r){setTimeout(r,900);});var panel=document.querySelector('.cal-panel');var cells=document.querySelectorAll('.cal-cell').length;var dots=document.querySelectorAll('.cal-dot.on').length;var isInput=!!document.querySelector('.date-picker-overlay input[type=date]');return{found:true,today:t,title:(document.querySelector('.cal-title')||{}).textContent,panel:!!panel,cells:cells,greenDots:dots,isNativeInput:isInput,overflowX:document.documentElement.scrollWidth>document.documentElement.clientWidth};}catch(e){return{crash:e.message,stack:(e.stack||'').slice(0,200)};}})()
